item_description: Splunk Overview

The Search & Reporting application (Search app) is the primary interface for using the Splunk software to run searches, save reports, and create dashboards. This Search Tutorial is for users who are new to the Splunk platform and the Search app.

item_description: Security

Splunk enables security analysts to quickly identify the root cause of security incidents and make informed decisions about how to remediate an issue. This hands-on experience enables you to use Splunk in a set of security-relevant real-world exercises.
The walkthrough shows core Splunk functionality that can be useful for security professionals, framing it around the search for and analysis of Indicators of Compromise
Security Analysis - Post Compromise remediation analysis, analysing what systems have been affected by the Compromise.
Security Analysis - An example of how you can leverage Splunk to streamline the process for finding Indicators Of Potential Compromise.
Security Analysis - An example of using VPN Logs for assessing anomalous activities, such as logging in from two seperate locations, in a un-realistic time duration.

This is another example showing how Splunk can help to rapidly solve complex security issues . For this section, we will close the loop on lateral movement investigation continuing from the last use case.
item_name: Sec- Walkthrough - Web Proxy - Tracking Command and Control

item_description: Point-of-Sale logs are being monitored for sales activity, allowing realtime insights into sales trends as they happen.
item_name: BA- What is selling in our retail stores, right now?

item_description: Using Point-of-Sale logs, we can examine the most popular product categories and the secondary products most often paired with them.  Do donuts go better with black coffee or cream?
item_name: BA- What products are customers buying together?

item_description: This retailer has introduced support for payment via the mobile loyalty card app, as well as via registered loyalty cards, both of which provide additional tracking and insights into customer purchase behavior.  Are customers taking advantage of the new payment methods?
item_name: BA- Are customers adopting new payment methods?

item_description: Promotions have been triggered as push notifications into the mobile app used by loyalty card holders to track their card balance. We can use mobile app transaction logs to track their exposure and claim rate.  Here are the results of the most recent batch of promotion push events
item_name: BA- How can Splunk improve and automate our marketing, in realtime?
